text_raw: Myurdin is holed up in the fortress atop the mountain.
text_clean: Myurdin is holed up in the fortress atop the mountain.

text_raw: For us to unleash our long overdue fury.
text_clean: For us to unleash our long overdue fury.

text_raw: What say we strike them once night falls?
text_clean: What say we strike them once night falls?

text_raw: Torches and battle cries will make up for our meager numbers.
text_clean: Torches and battle cries will make up for our meager numbers.

text_raw: Once their lines break, chaos will ensue.
text_clean: Once their lines break, chaos will ensue.

text_raw: That's when you Greymanes go for Myurdin.
text_clean: That's when you Greymanes go for Myurdin.

text_raw: Of course, it won't be easy.
text_clean: Of course, it won't be easy.

text_raw: But let us fix our minds on victory.
text_clean: But let us fix our minds on victory.

text_raw: Good! Let's wipe out every last one of those bastards!
text_clean: Good! Let's wipe out every last one of those bastards!

text_raw: It's time we set everything right.
text_clean: It's time we set everything right.

text_raw: They must pay for every tear they've caused Pailune.
text_clean: They must pay for every tear they've caused Pailune.

text_raw: Get some rest for now. A long battle awaits us tonight.
